overall.description: First-person exploration through a gothic wizarding castle (Hogwarts Legacy), walking from an open courtyard through covered stone cloisters with arched windows, passing students in robes, and emerging into a main courtyard with towering spires under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with curved stone staircase and balustrade

events.description: approaching and entering the large gothic archway from the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across the mossy stone courtyard toward the dark archway entrance

entered.detail: curved stone steps with moss growing between the cracks
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars
large pointed stone archway serving as entrance to the building
tall grey stone facade with tall narrow windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in an open courtyard with mossy cobblestone ground. The camera approaches a large gothic archway entrance, passing a curved stone staircase on the right and an ornate balustrade on the left. The atmosphere is quiet and overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone cloister with gothic tracery windows

events.description: entering the covered stone corridor from the open courtyard, light becomes more diffused
passing by a large stone statue of a centaur on a pedestal to the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered cloister, passing a stone statue on the right

entered.detail: long covered walkway with wooden ceiling and stone columns
massive stone pillars supporting the corridor roof
ornate pointed arch windows with stone lattice work
large weathered stone statue of a centaur on a circular pedestal

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered cloister, the space becomes semi-enclosed with massive stone columns lining the walkway. Gothic tracery windows on the left let in diffused light. The camera passes a prominent stone centaur statue on a pedestal to the right as it moves deeper into the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cloister walkway leading to open balcony overlook

events.description: passing students in dark robes walking in the opposite direction
reaching the open balcony area with stone balustrade overlooking distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and passing students in school robes

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the camera carrying books
two students standing and conversing on the balcony overlooking the view

entered.detail: stone seating along the corridor walls
distant mountain range visible through the open archway
stone railing at the edge of the balcony

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the cloister, the camera encounters students walking in the opposite direction. The corridor opens to a balcony with a stone balustrade offering a view of distant mountains. Two students stand conversing at the overlook while others walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker interior corridor section with wall sconces

events.description: entering a darker section of the corridor with reduced natural light from windows
passing another student walking in the opposite direction near the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dimly lit corridor toward the exit

notable_agents.action: student in robes walking past the camera toward the balcony

entered.detail: deeper section of the corridor with less natural lighting

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the balcony, the camera proceeds through a darker, more enclosed section of the corridor. The lighting becomes dimmer as the windows become less frequent. A student passes by walking toward the balcony area as the camera continues toward the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: main castle courtyard with towering gothic spires

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the large open main courtyard with castle towers
approaching and stopping at the large metal door entrance

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor and walking across the main courtyard toward the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead toward the castle entrance

entered.detail: large open stone courtyard with mossy cobblestones
tall gothic towers with pointed roofs rising above the courtyard
massive metal door with grid pattern and green patina
wide stone staircase leading up to the main entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a vast main courtyard dominated by towering gothic spires and castle towers. The camera walks across the mossy cobblestones, passing a student, and approaches a massive iron door at the top of stone entrance steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet outer courtyard through a series of gothic cloisters and finally into a vast central castle plaza. It begins on mossy cobblestones, gliding past a curved staircase and an ornate balustrade toward a large gothic archway. As the camera enters the covered cloister, the space becomes semi-enclosed by massive stone columns and tracery windows, passing a stone centaur statue before the corridor opens onto a balcony overlooking distant mountains where students gather. The scene then shifts into a dimmer, more enclosed section of the walkway with infrequent lighting before turning toward the corridor exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a wide main courtyard dominated by towering spires, crossing the mossy ground toward a massive iron door atop stone steps.
